scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --workspace @quizmaker/shared && npm run dev --workspace @quizmaker/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace @quizmaker/shared && npm run dev --workspace @quizmaker/backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @quizmaker/shared && npm run build --workspace @quizmaker/backend && npm run build --workspace @quizmaker/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @quizmaker/shared && npm run test --workspace @quizmaker/backend && npm run test --workspace @quizmaker/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @quizmaker/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @quizmaker/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @quizmaker/frontend
